channel.title: barefoot___wanderer
channel.description: DIY ЁЯкЪ Building my own container house тЪТя╕П Owner Builder Learning as I go ЁЯТк

item.title: The time is FINALLY here IтАЩm installing myтАж SUBFLOORS!!! ЁЯ...
item.description:
The time is FINALLY here IтАЩm installing myтАж SUBFLOORS!!! ЁЯдМ The process is: Vapour barrier тАФ-> XPS foam board insulationтАФ-> plywood (then depending what area) тАФ-> cement fibre board (wet areas and areas where tiles, clay plaster or micro cement is being installed) OR Floorboards (on top of the plywood) ЁЯШНЁЯСП This is a bloody moment and I couldnтАЩt be more ready for it ЁЯСК
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
